title: Peruvian Egg Frittata
description: A delicious and easy-to-make Peruvian-inspired egg dish featuring a crunchy crust.
instructions: In a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of buttery over medium heat.
Add the crushed crunchy and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the ground cumin and cook for an additional minute.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and shredded cheese.
Pour the egg mixture over the skillet and cook until the eggs start to set.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the eggs are set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Slice into wedges and serve hot.
